name: codeer
description: AI emergency response for broken software.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,worker -c auto "npm run dev -w @codeer/web" "npm run dev -w @codeer/api" "npm run dev -w @codeer/worker"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.check: npm run workspace:check && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run security:check
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @codeer/contracts && npm run build -w @codeer/config && npm run build -w @codeer/logger && npm run build -w @codeer/database && npm run build -w @codeer/github && npm run build -w @codeer/repository
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @codeer/api && npm run build -w @codeer/worker && npm run build -w @codeer/web
scripts.security:check: npm run security:secrets && npm run security:audit
